title: Settings
subtitle: Account, preferences, icons, and Boursorama import.

account.title: Account
account.profilePictureHelp: Click the icon to edit. PNG or JPEG, max 1 MB.

server.title: Server
server.subtitle: Address of your self-hosted instance.
server.insecureWarning: HTTP is allowed for local/self-hosted servers. Just verify that the phone can reach this hostname or IP on the same network.

preferences.title: My preferences
preferences.interfaceLanguageHelp: Choose the language used for application text.
preferences.privateModeHelp: Hides figures linked to your portfolio on every page.
preferences.privateModeDetails: Market data (prices, daily changes) remains visible. Only personal amounts (total value, dividends, fees, performance) are replaced by dots.
preferences.localPeaSearchHelp: Uses the local PEA stock and ETF list to speed up search and avoid API calls.
preferences.localPeaSearchDetails: When enabled, only PEA-eligible securities are suggested. Disable it to search all stocks and ETFs.
preferences.assetNewsHelp: Shows articles linked to the ticker on an asset detail page.
preferences.assetNewsDetails: When disabled, no article block is displayed and no backend news call is made.
preferences.newsLanguagesHelp: Keep at least one language enabled for articles.
preferences.newsLanguageLocked: At least one language must remain enabled

imports.csvHelp: Import or synchronize the full portfolio state.
imports.confirmDeleteMissing: Confirm deletion of positions missing from the CSV?
imports.avisOperesHelp: Extract, check, then import buy or sell operations.

icons.title: Asset icons
icons.empty: No asset in portfolio or watchlist.
